15	export function ThemeProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
16	  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<Theme>(() => {
17	    const stored = localStorage.getItem('theme')
18	    if (stored === 'dark' || stored === 'light') return stored
19	    return typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.matchMedia?.('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light'
20	  })
21	
22	  useEffect(() => {
23	    document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', theme === 'dark')
24	    localStorage.setItem('theme', theme)
25	  }, [theme])
26	
27	  const toggleTheme = () => setTheme((t) => (t === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'))
28	
29	  return <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ theme, toggleTheme }}>{children}</ThemeContext.Provider>
30	}

1	type Method = 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE'
2	
3	let isRefreshing = false
4	let failedQueue: Array<{
5	  resolve: (token: string) => void
6	  reject: (error: unknown) => void
7	}> = []
8	
9	const processQueue = (error: unknown, token: string | null = null) => {
10	  failedQueue.forEach((p) => (token ? p.resolve(token) : p.reject(error)))
11	  failedQueue = []
12	}
13	
14	async function doFetch(method: Method, url: string, body: unknown, token: string | null): Promise<Response> {
15	  const headers: Record<string, string> = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
16	  if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`
17	  return fetch(url, {
18	    method,
19	    headers,
20	    body: body !== undefined ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
21	  })
22	}
23	
24	async function parseResponse<T>(res: Response): Promise<{ data: T }> {
25	  if (!res.ok) return Promise.reject(await res.json().catch(() => ({})))
26	  return { data: (await res.json()) as T }
27	}
28	
29	async function request<T>(method: Method, url: string, body?: unknown): Promise<{ data: T }> {
30	  const token = localStorage.getItem('access_token')
31	  const res = await doFetch(method, url, body, token)
32	
33	  const isAuthEndpoint = url.includes('/auth/refresh') || url.includes('/auth/login')
34	  if (res.status !== 401 || isAuthEndpoint) {
35	    return parseResponse<T>(res)
36	  }
37	
38	  // 401 — queue behind an in-flight refresh or start one
39	  if (isRefreshing) {
40	    return new Promise<{ data: T }>((resolve, reject) => {
41	      failedQueue.push({
42	        resolve: (newToken) => resolve(doFetch(method, url, body, newToken).then((r) => parseResponse<T>(r))),
43	        reject,
44	      })
45	    })
46	  }
47	
48	  isRefreshing = true
49	
50	  try {
51	    const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refresh_token')
52	    if (!refreshToken) throw new Error('No refresh token')
53	
54	    const refreshRes = await fetch('/api/v1/auth/refresh', {
55	      method: 'POST',
56	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
57	      body: JSON.stringify({ refresh_token: refreshToken }),
58	    })
59	
60	    if (!refreshRes.ok) throw new Error('Token refresh failed')
61	
62	    const { access_token } = await refreshRes.json()
63	    localStorage.setItem('access_token', access_token)
64	    processQueue(null, access_token)
65	
66	    return parseResponse<T>(await doFetch(method, url, body, access_token))
67	  } catch (err) {
68	    processQueue(err, null)
69	    localStorage.removeItem('access_token')
70	    localStorage.removeItem('refresh_token')
71	    sessionStorage.setItem('auth_expired', '1')
72	    window.location.href = '/login'
73	    return Promise.reject(err)
74	  } finally {
75	    isRefreshing = false
76	  }
77	}
78

80	  get: <T>(url: string) => request<T>('GET', url),
81	  post: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('POST', url, body),
82	  put: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('PUT', url, body),
83	  patch: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('PATCH', url, body),
84	  delete: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('DELETE', url, body),
